name: bmad-help
description: Analyzes current state and user query to answer BMad questions or recommend the next skill(s) to use. Use when user asks for help, bmad help, what to do next, or what to start with in BMad.

name: bmad-init
description: Initialize BMad project configuration and load config variables. Use when any skill needs module-specific configuration values, or when setting up a new BMad project.

name: bmad-change-request
description: First step for change requests: read lessons learned, scaffold _bmad-output/requests/{id}, fill manifest and source/. Extract .docx via scripts/extract_docx_text.py. Use when starting from email, Word, or unstructured input.

name: bmad-change-discovery
description: Discovery phase: fill discovery.md from manifest and source, map repo targets, list ambiguities. No patches or commits. Use after bmad-change-request.

name: bmad-change-proposal
description: Write proposed changes under proposal/ for human review; no commit until developer approves; append agent-lessons-learned on close. Use after bmad-change-discovery.
